decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly deploying a wide range of aggressive creatures and using powerful spells like Tribal Flames and Lightning Bolt to deal damage to the opponent. The deck contains a mixture of multicolored creatures and spells which benefits from Leyline of the Guildpact and Leyline Binding to boost their effectiveness. By utilizing a variety of aggressive creatures and versatile spells, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory through consistent pressure and efficient removal. The combination of speed and versatility makes this deck a formidable force in Modern 1 vs 1 matchups.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by using counter spells, removal, and card draw to disrupt the opponent's game plan. It also utilizes powerful planeswalkers and creatures to stabilize the board and eventually win the game. The main win condition of the deck is to generate card advantage through various spells and abilities while keeping the opponent's threats at bay until it can establish a dominant position and secure the victory.

The main concept of this deck is to control the board and opponent's resources using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and disruptive creatures. By continuously disrupting the opponent's game plan, while establishing a board presence with evasive threats like Murktide Regent and Wan Shi Tong, the deck aims to control the pace of the game and ultimately outvalue the opponent. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Subtlety and Gloomlake Verge provides additional control options and utility to adapt to different matchups.

The main concept of this deck is to use the Dredge mechanic to fill the graveyard with cards like Arclight Phoenix and Creeping Chill. By constantly dredging cards from the graveyard back into the hand, players can trigger powerful effects like returning Phoenix to the battlefield or dealing damage with Creeping Chill. The deck also includes cards like Life from the Loam and Faithless Looting to further manipulate the graveyard and maximize the effectiveness of the Dredge strategy. Overall, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful combos and graveyard synergies.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Territorial Kavu. The key strategy is to control the board with cards like Leyline Binding and Stubborn Denial while utilizing powerful finishers like Scion of Draco and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury. Consign to Memory provides card advantage and disruption, while Lightning Bolt serves as versatile removal. Teferi, Time Raveler helps with tempo and protecting key pieces. The mana base is optimized for consistency and flexibility, with options for both aggressive and control plays.

The main concept of this deck is to generate mana quickly and efficiently in order to play powerful combo pieces like Amulet of Vigor and Primeval Titan. By utilizing cards like Arboreal Grazer, Lotus Field, and Urza's Saga, the deck aims to find ways to ramp up to its key pieces quickly and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creature attacks and land triggers. Green Sun's Zenith and Scapeshift serve as additional ways to find key pieces of the combo, while cards like Boseiju, Who Endures and Malevolent Rumble offer protection and disruption against opposing strategies.

The deck focuses on quickly playing artifacts at a low cost to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive threats. It utilizes cards like Mishra's Bauble and Engineered Explosives to control the board while generating value through cards like Thoughtcast and Urza's Saga. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Mox Opal help to recur artifacts from the graveyard, providing additional resources and resilience. The deck aims to establish a strong board presence early in the game and leverage its synergy among artifacts to close out the game quickly.

The deck focuses on generating mana quickly through cards like Ruby Medallion, Pyretic Ritual, and Manamorphose to cast Ral, Monsoon Mage and combo off with spells like Desperate Ritual and Grapeshot. It utilizes cards like Glimpse the Impossible and Flashback to filter through the deck and find key combo pieces. Additionally, it includes ways to recur spells from the graveyard with Past in Flames and utilizes Wish cards to search for specific cards when needed. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful combo turn and win the game quickly.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature plays and utilizing burn spells to control the board and deal direct damage to the opponent. The deck's strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, while also using cards like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge for removal and additional damage. The deck also includes some utility cards like Path to Exile for removal and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah for card advantage. The inclusion of cards like Blood Moon and Ranger-Captain of Eos allows for disruption and flexibility in different matchups.

The key concept of this Aggro - Affinity deck is to quickly swarm the board with artifacts, generating synergies with cards like Urza's Saga and Mox Opal to power out early threats. By using efficient artifacts and card draw spells like Mishra's Bauble and Thoughtcast, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creature and spell-based aggression. The inclusion of cards like Engineered Explosives and Pinnacle Emissary provide additional removal and reach, allowing the deck to adapt to various matchups and maintain pressure on the opponent. The deck's versatility and speed make it a strong contender in Modern 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck focuses on utilizing the synergy between creatures with Devourer and Bloodchief mechanics to ramp up resources and overwhelm opponents quickly. By combining cards like Basking Broodscale, Blade of the Bloodchief, and Glaring Fleshraker with powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End, the deck aims to control the battlefield and deal massive damage in a short amount of time. Utilizing lands like Urza's Saga and Eldrazi Temple for extra mana acceleration, the deck strives to outpace opponents and secure victory through a strong, aggressive combo strategy.

This deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with creatures like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Griselbrand, then using Goryo's Vengeance to bring them back to the battlefield. Instant spells like Ephemerate and Solitude provide disruption and protection, allowing for explosive plays. Thoughtseize helps to control the opponent's hand, while Tainted Indulgence can provide additional card advantage. The goal is to combo off and reanimate powerful creatures while keeping the opponent on the back foot with disruption and removal.

This UW Control deck focuses on disrupting opponent's strategies with counterspells and removal, while also gaining card advantage with Narset, Parter of Veils and Consult the Star Charts. The deck also includes ways to recycle key spells with cards like Day's Undoing and Meticulous Archive. The deck aims to control the game, answer threats efficiently, and ultimately win through attrition by outvaluing the opponent.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying artifacts to the battlefield in order to overwhelm the opponent with a large number of threats. By utilizing cards like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble for ramp and card draw, as well as high-value artifacts like Arcbound Ravager and Engineered Explosives, the deck aims to control the board while also pushing damage through with cards like Pinnacle Emissary and Kappa Cannoneer. Additionally, Urza's Saga is used to tutor for key artifact pieces, giving the deck consistency and the ability to adapt to different board states.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creatures and generating value through sacrificing creatures and dealing direct damage. Key cards include Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Goblin Bombardment to deal damage, Guide of Souls to protect creatures, and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah for card advantage. The deck also includes cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer for additional aggression. The use of sacrifice outlets like Goblin Bombardment and Elegant Parlor provides added versatility and the ability to control the board while aggressively pressuring the opponent.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive plays with low-cost creatures and burn spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The key strategy is to maintain a fast pace of play, utilizing efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to apply pressure early on. Additionally, cards like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge provide direct damage to finish off opponents or clear the way for attacks. The deck also includes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Seasoned Pyromancer for additional value and board presence, while maintaining a strong mana base with cards like Arid Mesa and Sacred Foundry.
